Subject: Reaching Out Regarding Data & Analytics Leadership Opportunity

Hi {first_name},

I’m {user}, a Data & Analytics leader with 15+ years at Verizon and 7+ years as a people leader. I recently applied for the {role_title} role at {company_name} and wanted to briefly introduce myself directly.

My work centers on decision science and enterprise experimentation—building scalable A/B testing and KPI governance frameworks that reduce risk in high-stakes decisions and turn complex data into executive-ready narratives. I’ve also delivered an innovative reporting solution that supported approximately $1M in new advertising revenue through improved monetization measurement.

If you’re involved in the hiring process, I’d welcome the opportunity to connect for a brief call. If not, I’d still appreciate staying in touch for future opportunities.

Warm regards,
{user}
{linkedin_url}

Subject: Following Up on {role_title} Application

Hi {first_name},
{below is example. each should be different per user's context, resume, etc}
Just wanted to follow up on my note regarding the {role_title} opportunity at {company_name}. I’m still very interested and would be glad to speak briefly if the role is still open.

Subject: Proven Results in Decision Science & Analytics Leadership 

Hi {first_name}, 
{below is example. each should be different per user's context, resume, etc}
I wanted to share a few highlights from my recent work that align well with what teams typically need in a senior Data & Analytics leader:
• Delivered $800M+ in annualized incremental value by scaling enterprise-wide experimentation and measurable growth initiatives
• Built repeatable A/B testing + statistical inference frameworks (hypothesis design, rigor, KPI governance, executive readouts) to reduce risk in high-stakes decisions
• Developed an innovative reporting solution that supported approximately $1M in new advertising revenue through improved monetization measurement
• 15+ years in Data & Analytics at Verizon, including 7+ years leading teams across digital analytics, BI, and marketing effectiveness

I’d be glad to explore how my background could support your team’s goals.

Sincerely,
{user}

Subject: A Few Quick Questions on the Role

Hi {first_name},
{below is example. each should be different per user's context, resume, etc}
I saw you’re in a leadership position at {company_name}, and I wanted to ask a few quick questions about the {role_title} role I recently applied for:

What competencies distinguish your top hires in this space (decision science/experimentation, modern data platforms, monetization measurement, executive storytelling, people leadership)?

How do you define success in the first 6 months for this role?

Are there aspects of leadership style or cultural fit you prioritize for the data organization?

I appreciate any insight you can share.

Best,
{user}

{more instructions / context / clarifications} New Messaging Structure - 

Line 1 - Research on the company -  Example - I’m reaching out after learning about GreyNoise Intelligence’s advanced threat detection platform and unique approach to filtering benign internet noise.

Line 2 - Bridge between the research and beginning to talk about the solution - example - Your team’s challenge to accurately validate alerts and reduce false positives aligns with how I Proof Point 

Line 3 - Talking about the solution / proof point / system you have used - example - In my current role, I have bulit out this proof point and they have seen an increase in revenue  

Line 4 - CTA about applying the proof point at their company - example - I'd love to explore how I can apply this to your company at the (job title)
